title: Chemical Engineering (English) Mission and Vision
content:
Chemical Engineering (English) Mission and Vision

Mission

Our goal is to train chemical engineers who possess a strong foundation in mathematics, science, and engineering; who can develop innovative solutions to chemical processes in various fields, particularly health, environment, and industry; who are sensitive to ethical values, focused on sustainable technologies; open to continuous learning, capable of conducting research, and possessing well-developed communication skills.

Vision

To be a nationally and internationally recognized, high-quality educational institution that trains chemical engineers who are open to interdisciplinary collaborations and can develop innovative solutions contributing to sustainable development and public health.
